mapper.select: SELECT p.id, p.category_id as categoryId, p.volunteer_id as volunteerId, p.title, p.content, p.views, p.status, p.create_time as createdAt, p.image_url as imageUrl, p.review_reason as reviewReason, p.shared_from_post_id as sharedFromPostId, p.shared_from_volunteer_id as sharedFromVolunteerId, p.shared_at as sharedAt, v.real_name as author, v.username as username, v.avatar as avatar, c.name as category, v2.real_name as sharedFromAuthor FROM forum_post p LEFT JOIN volunteer v ON p.volunteer_id = v.id LEFT JOIN forum_category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN volunteer v2 ON p.shared_from_volunteer_id = v2.id ORDER BY p.id DESC

SELECT p.id, p.category_id as categoryId, p.volunteer_id as volunteerId, p.title, p.content, p.views, p.status, p.create_time as createdAt, p.image_url as imageUrl, p.review_reason as reviewReason, p.shared_from_post_id as sharedFromPostId, p.shared_from_volunteer_id as sharedFromVolunteerId, p.shared_at as sharedAt, v.real_name as author, v.username as username, v.avatar as avatar, c.name as category, v2.real_name as sharedFromAuthor FROM forum_post p LEFT JOIN volunteer v ON p.volunteer_id = v.id LEFT JOIN forum_category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN volunteer v2 ON p.shared_from_volunteer_id = v2.id WHERE p.category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY p.id DESC

SELECT p.id, p.category_id as categoryId, p.volunteer_id as volunteerId, p.title, p.content, p.views, p.status, p.create_time as createdAt, p.image_url as imageUrl, p.review_reason as reviewReason, p.shared_from_post_id as sharedFromPostId, p.shared_from_volunteer_id as sharedFromVolunteerId, p.shared_at as sharedAt, v.real_name as author, v.username as username, v.avatar as avatar, c.name as category, v2.real_name as sharedFromAuthor FROM forum_post p LEFT JOIN volunteer v ON p.volunteer_id = v.id LEFT JOIN forum_category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN volunteer v2 ON p.shared_from_volunteer_id = v2.id WHERE p.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR v.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') ORDER BY p.id DESC

SELECT p.id, p.category_id as categoryId, p.volunteer_id as volunteerId, p.title, p.content, p.views, p.status, p.create_time as createdAt, p.image_url as imageUrl, p.review_reason as reviewReason, p.shared_from_post_id as sharedFromPostId, p.shared_from_volunteer_id as sharedFromVolunteerId, p.shared_at as sharedAt, v.real_name as author, v.username as username, v.avatar as avatar, c.name as category, v2.real_name as sharedFromAuthor FROM forum_post p LEFT JOIN volunteer v ON p.volunteer_id = v.id LEFT JOIN forum_category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN volunteer v2 ON p.shared_from_volunteer_id = v2.id WHERE p.id = #{id}

SELECT p.id, p.category_id as categoryId, p.volunteer_id as volunteerId, p.title, p.content, p.views, p.status, p.create_time as createdAt, p.image_url as imageUrl, p.review_reason as reviewReason, p.shared_from_post_id as sharedFromPostId, p.shared_from_volunteer_id as sharedFromVolunteerId, p.shared_at as sharedAt, v.real_name as author, v.username as username, v.avatar as avatar, c.name as category, v2.real_name as sharedFromAuthor FROM forum_post p LEFT JOIN volunteer v ON p.volunteer_id = v.id LEFT JOIN forum_category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN volunteer v2 ON p.shared_from_volunteer_id = v2.id WHERE p.volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} ORDER BY p.create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_post (category_id, volunteer_id, title, content, status, image_url, review_reason) VALUES (#{categoryId}, #{volunteerId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{status}, #{imageUrl}, #{reviewReason})
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_post SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, status = #{status}, category_id = #{categoryId}, image_url = #{imageUrl}, review_reason = #{reviewReason} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forum_post SET views = IFNULL(views, 0) + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forum_post WHERE shared_from_post_id = #{postId} AND volunteer_id = #{volunteerId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_post (category_id, volunteer_id, title, content, status, image_url, shared_from_post_id, shared_from_volunteer_id, shared_at) SELECT category_id, #{volunteerId}, title, content, 'approved', image_url, id, volunteer_id, NOW() FROM forum_post WHERE id = #{postId}
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forum_post WHERE category_id = #{categoryId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forum_post WHERE volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} AND status = '已通过'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forum_post WHERE status = '已通过'

SELECT p.id, p.category_id as categoryId, p.volunteer_id as volunteerId, p.title, p.content, p.views, p.status, p.create_time as createdAt, p.image_url as imageUrl, p.review_reason as reviewReason, p.shared_from_post_id as sharedFromPostId, p.shared_from_volunteer_id as sharedFromVolunteerId, p.shared_at as sharedAt, v.real_name as author, v.username as username, v.avatar as avatar, c.name as category, v2.real_name as sharedFromAuthor FROM forum_post p INNER JOIN forum_post_favorite f ON p.id = f.post_id LEFT JOIN volunteer v ON p.volunteer_id = v.id LEFT JOIN forum_category c ON p.category_id = c.id LEFT JOIN volunteer v2 ON p.shared_from_volunteer_id = v2.id WHERE f.volunteer_id = #{volunteerId} ORDER BY p.id DESC
